calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Allow Limited Access To Defendants Property For Construction And Repairs
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Timothy Flaherty; 415-984-8500; Clark Hill LP; counsel appearing for plaintiff.
Anthony Phillips; 415-364-5540; Fox Rothschild; counsel appearing for defendant.
Reporter: Angela Pourtabib; CSR# 13714; 415-601-7054; apourtabib@gmail.com

Mr. Flaherty contests the courts tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF YVES FRINAULT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Allow Limited Access To Defendants Property For Construction And Repairs is DENIED. Moving party failed to meet its burden for preliminary injunction.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Reported: Angela Pourtabib; CSR# 13714; 415-601-7054; apourtabib@gmail.com (D501)
